3149260.name: Another Castle
3149260.description:
This Princess is in...

Another Castle is a fast-paced, challenging, dungeon-crawling roguelike shooter. Traverse an ever-changing castle filled with odd characters, gun-wielding cult members, stat upgrades and amazing ability-giving items, tackle difficult challenges and discover mysterious secrets that reveal more about the castle's origins!

Features

  • Fast-paced twin-stick shooter action

  • Roguelike elements with random castle floors, items and enemies

  • Over 80+ Items that can upgrade stats, grant new abilities or even cheat death!

  • Mysterious secrets to uncover and hidden areas to unlock

  • Accessibility options including remappable controls, multiple control schemes, adjustable game speed, bullet colours and more
3149260.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
